user.title: Authorize sunnypilot
user.description:
Open the URL below on your phone and enter the code to authorize:

**URL:** {url}

**Code:** `{code}`

This page will advance automatically once authorized.

abort.no_devices: No sunnypilot devices found on this account.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Sunnylink. Check your network.
abort.device_code_expired: The authorization code expired. Please try again.
